data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T17:40 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content: ✓ Heartbeat updated

toolUseResult.stdout: ✓ Heartbeat updated

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-037x [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-0z5n: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-krhd: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-nkg0: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-zt1g: Scan agent health ● P2

content.content:
○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-6cmvi · Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages   [● P2 · OPEN]
Type: task
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Check deacon inbox for messages.

**Process in priority order:**
1. LIFECYCLE requests (cycle/restart/shutdown) → execute immediately
2. TIMER callbacks → fire if time has passed
3. HANDOFF messages → read for context, then delete
4. General messages → handle as appropriate

**Commands:**
- `gt mail inbox`
- `gt mail read <id>`
- `gt mail delete <id>` (ALWAYS delete after handling)


PARENT
  ↑ ? skogtown-wisp-wisp-m0uin: (EPIC) mol-deacon-patrol ● P2

BLOCKS
  ← ○ skogtown-wisp-wisp-w5bqs: Scan agent health ● P2
